subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Strengthen the hearts of Thy loved ones through Thy might and power, that they may not be made fearful by them that dwell upon Thine earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی قو قلوب احبائک بقدرتک و سلطانک لئلا یخوفهم من فی ارضک ثم
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
